title: URL slug generator
description: Write slugify(text) that converts text to a URL slug: lowercase, alphanumerics kept, runs of spaces/hyphens/underscores collapsed to single hyphens, other characters dropped, no leading/trailing hyphen. Always return a string.
constraints: ALWAYS return a str — never None.
No leading or trailing hyphens; no double hyphens.
properties: assert not out.startswith('-') and not out.endswith('-')
